title: muscari racemosum subsp. neglectum
intro: Muscari racemosum subsp. neglectum, also known as the grape hyacinth, is a low-growing, bulbous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses medicinal properties due to the presence of cardiac glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat heart conditions and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Muscari racemosum subsp. neglectum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of grape hyacinth can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
